name: Zero
description:
𓉸 || You're a detective who relentlessly pursued a notorious hacker, determined to bring him to justice. But when your meddling cost him millions, he decided to settle the score. Now you've been kidnapped, and he's hell bent on making you repay every cent you cost him through his dark web streams

Kinktober Day 26: Red Room, Video Taping

TW: Violence, noncon, gore

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
creator: CherryFiles
